overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit, industrial sci-fi living quarters with red emergency lighting. The character walks past a wall-mounted screen and bunk beds toward a central table with a glowing device, examining the room's details.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi living quarters with bunk beds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the living quarters past the bunk beds and wall screen

entered.detail: large screen displaying red warning symbols and text
industrial military-style bunk beds with storage underneath
exposed ventilation ducts and cable conduits running along the ceiling
papers and trash scattered across the metal floor plates
circular table with a glowing cylindrical device visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit industrial room bathed in red emergency lighting, passing a wall-mounted screen displaying alerts and metal bunk beds. Exposed pipes run along the ceiling while debris litters the floor, and a glowing table is visible ahead in the center of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: central living area with holographic device

events.description: approaching the glowing central table, the device becomes clearly visible

agents.ego_description: circling around the central table to examine the glowing device and surrounding equipment

entered.detail: desk with multiple monitors displaying data and control panels
tall industrial storage lockers against the left wall
green canvas folding chair near the table

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the room, approaching the circular table with a glowing cylindrical device that illuminates the immediate area. A computer terminal and metal lockers become visible on the left while the bunk beds pass out of view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: back of quarters near exit door

events.description: character moves away from the central table toward the back wall

agents.ego_description: moving toward the back wall of the room, leaving the central table behind

entered.detail: metal wall with large pipes and a sealed door
circular metal drain or maintenance hatch in the floor

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the central table and computer station behind, walking toward the back wall of the room. The back wall features heavy industrial piping and a door, with a circular floor drain visible in the center of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial living quarters that shifts from a wide view of the room's perimeter to a close examination of its central equipment and rear exit. It begins with the character walking through a space bathed in red emergency lighting, passing a wall-mounted alert screen and metal bunk beds beneath exposed ceiling pipes. As the character moves deeper into the room, the scene shifts focus toward a circular table where a glowing cylindrical device illuminates the immediate area, revealing a computer terminal and metal lockers to the left. The camera then follows the character as they leave the central station behind, moving across a walkway marked by a circular floor drain. Finally, the perspective turns toward the back wall, closing in on heavy industrial piping and a distant door.
